name: Vegetable-Bulgur Pilaf
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart saucepan, cook chopped onion, chopped celery, sliced mushrooms, and garlic in hot oil about 5 minutes or until vegetables are tender but not brown.
2. Stir in sliced carrots, sliced zucchini, chicken/beef/vegetable broth, red or green pepper strips (if using), bulgur, dried tarragon, and salt.
3. Bring to a boil; reduce heat. Cover and simmer for 8 to 10 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
4. Makes 4 servings.
5. Food Exchanges per serving: 1 vegetable exchange.
6. Substituting Bulgur for Quinoa is recommended.
